description: General dad jokes set #4. Hand-written, less templated.

jokes.setup: I tried writing jokes with a broken pencil.
jokes.punchline: There was no point to any of them.

jokes.setup: My suitcase keeps telling travel stories.
jokes.punchline: Most of them are just baggage.

jokes.setup: I bought a waterproof tea bag.
jokes.punchline: Now my tea is emotionally prepared.

jokes.setup: I asked my calendar for advice.
jokes.punchline: It told me to take things one day at a time.

jokes.setup: My lamp started giving life coaching.
jokes.punchline: It really helped me see things differently.

jokes.setup: I opened a bakery for insomniacs.
jokes.punchline: Business rises overnight.

jokes.setup: I challenged a mirror to a staring contest.
jokes.punchline: It reflected on the experience.

jokes.setup: My chair asked for a vacation.
jokes.punchline: It was tired of supporting everyone.

jokes.setup: I gave my broom a promotion.
jokes.punchline: It swept the competition.

jokes.setup: I started a support group for ladders.
jokes.punchline: We're all trying to get to the next level.

jokes.setup: My notebook became a comedian.
jokes.punchline: Every page was a fresh delivery.

jokes.setup: I taught my toaster optimism.
jokes.punchline: Now every morning starts on a brighter note.

jokes.setup: My umbrella loves compliments.
jokes.punchline: They really make it open up.

jokes.setup: I bought a tiny vacuum.
jokes.punchline: It still sucks.

jokes.setup: My backpack quit its job.
jokes.punchline: It couldn't carry the workload anymore.

jokes.setup: I started a band with office supplies.
jokes.punchline: We're called The Paper Clips.

jokes.setup: I complimented my ruler.
jokes.punchline: It really measured up.

jokes.setup: My coffee mug became a therapist.
jokes.punchline: It always had warm advice.

jokes.setup: I gave my pillow a raise.
jokes.punchline: It was doing overtime every night.

jokes.setup: My flashlight got stage fright.
jokes.punchline: It couldn't handle the spotlight.

jokes.setup: I named my Wi-Fi 'Grandma'.
jokes.punchline: Now everyone says Grandma's connection is strong.

jokes.setup: I tried to fold a cloud.
jokes.punchline: The instructions were a little fuzzy.

jokes.setup: My socks entered a talent show.
jokes.punchline: They knocked everyone's feet off.

jokes.setup: I bought a transparent wallet.
jokes.punchline: Now everyone can see I'm broke.

jokes.setup: I became friends with an elevator.
jokes.punchline: It always lifts my spirits.

jokes.setup: My pencil wrote me a thank-you note.
jokes.punchline: It was a touching point.

jokes.setup: I hired a snowman in summer.
jokes.punchline: He totally melted under pressure.

jokes.setup: My broom won employee of the month.
jokes.punchline: It always cleaned up.

jokes.setup: I put a hat on my cactus.
jokes.punchline: Now it's extra sharp.

jokes.setup: My sandwich told me a secret.
jokes.punchline: It was hard to digest.

jokes.setup: I took my calculator on vacation.
jokes.punchline: It needed to unwind the numbers.

jokes.setup: My blanket got jealous.
jokes.punchline: It thought I was seeing someone under the covers.

jokes.setup: I bought a dictionary for my parrot.
jokes.punchline: Its vocabulary is still bird-brained.

jokes.setup: My doormat is an optimist.
jokes.punchline: It always welcomes new opportunities.

jokes.setup: I gave my clock a pep talk.
jokes.punchline: Now it's running with confidence.

jokes.setup: My stapler joined the gym.
jokes.punchline: It's working on its attachment issues.

jokes.setup: I taught my refrigerator mindfulness.
jokes.punchline: Now it chills on purpose.

jokes.setup: My bookshelf started singing.
jokes.punchline: It has great shelf-esteem.

jokes.setup: I tried to interview my echo.
jokes.punchline: Every answer sounded familiar.

jokes.setup: My bicycle writes poetry.
jokes.punchline: Most of it has good cadence.

jokes.setup: I named my plant 'Wi-Fi'.
jokes.punchline: Everyone asks how the connection is growing.

jokes.setup: My kettle became a motivational speaker.
jokes.punchline: It knows exactly when to let off steam.

jokes.setup: My scissors took dance lessons.
jokes.punchline: Now they really know how to cut a rug.

jokes.setup: I complimented my window.
jokes.punchline: It said I gave it a fresh outlook.

jokes.setup: My mailbox loves birthdays.
jokes.punchline: It's always hoping for more presents.

jokes.setup: I bought a lazy boomerang.
jokes.punchline: It never came back to me.

jokes.setup: My alarm clock became a comedian.
jokes.punchline: Its timing is perfect.

jokes.setup: I adopted a paper airplane.
jokes.punchline: It has lofty ambitions.

jokes.setup: My toothbrush became a lawyer.
jokes.punchline: It always argues its case with plaque facts.

jokes.setup: I entered my shadow in a marathon.
jokes.punchline: It stayed right behind me the whole time.
